title: Wavy Banners
description: Better and renewed pixel consistent textures for banners and patterns
body:
I always hated that banners had smaller pixels, not only on the fabric but on the wooden post too, also the texture is very ugly and simple.
There are some resource packs that change the scale of the pixels in the banner, but not the rest of the model.

### Features:
- Changes the scale by a 1.5x of the banner 3D model and textures to achieve pixel consistency.
- (Now the banner fabric has a size of 14x28 instead of 20x40, and the wooden post is 2 pixels wide).
- Improved and more detailed texture of banner, wooden post and leash, patterns and color map.

### Note:
- The design of the patterns can also be used on the shields, using [Medieval Tactical Shield](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/medieval-tactical-shield) or Better Vanilla Shields [Coming Soon].

### Dependencies:
- This requires [Entity Model Features [EMF]](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) + [Entity Texture Features [ETF]](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures).
